items.heading: Definitions (Key Definitions)
items.content: Key definitions that are most frequently used in GST compliance including business, consideration, goods, services, and taxable person.
items.notes: Most commonly referred section in GST

items.heading: Scope of Supply
items.content: Definition of supply including all forms of supply of goods or services for consideration in the course or furtherance of business.

items.heading: Definition of Business
items.content: Business includes any trade, commerce, manufacture, or any adventure in the nature of trade, commerce, or manufacture.
items.notes: Determines who is liable to register
